label: The Prismvault Store
description: The Prismvault Store occupies a deep-cut bay behind Cairnglass Eyrie’s mirror-slag fins, its basalt-glass walls inscribed with calibrated linework that preserves the residence’s navigational geometry even in utility spaces. Narrow shelving alcoves are faced with dust-binding ribs that hold electrostatically pinned glass grit in measured gradients, preventing particulate drift into the main terraces. Crated compartments sit within shallow, lipped channels of mirror-slag to interrupt vibration and keep contents aligned to the escarpment’s seam-line orientation. A high, slit-like light catch admits a copper-white band of twilight that reads as a fixed optical gauge across the storage tiers.
